description: Chapter 2.6.5 - Recently Played & Continue Listening Experience. Create a new 'History' tab (or dedicated section) in the favorites/library page with a premium listening timeline, continue listening cards, session grouping, listening statistics, insights, search/filter, and recommendations. Extends existing recently-played localStorage infrastructure in lib/personalization.ts.
steps: Create app/components/favorites/history/ directory for all new components

Extend lib/personalization.ts - Add playback progress tracking: store playbackPosition, completionPercentage, lastPlayedAt, sessionId per track. Add helper functions: getListeningHistory(), addHistoryEntry(), removeHistoryEntry(), clearHistory(), getPlaybackProgress(), updatePlaybackProgress(), getListeningSessions(). Use a new localStorage key 'music-search-listening-history'
Update the FavoritesContext or PersonalizationContext to expose listeningHistory state with the same useSyncExternalStore pattern used for favorites

Create RecentlyPlayedHero.tsx - Glass Level 5 hero: last played song artwork as blurred background with gradient, listening streak display, hours played this week, quick resume button for last unfinished track

Create ContinueListening.tsx - Featured section showing unfinished tracks (completion < 100%) with: artwork, song title, artist, album, progress bar showing completion percentage, time remaining, resume button, dismiss button. Glass Level 4 card styling. Always appears first when items exist

Create ListeningTimeline.tsx - Group entries by: Today, Yesterday, This Week, Last Week, This Month, Older. Sticky date headers. Each item shows: artwork, song, artist, album, time played, duration, progress. Collapsible groups
Create ListeningSession.tsx - Groups consecutive plays (within 30 min gap) into sessions showing: session duration, songs played, artists, album artwork stack
Create RecentlyPlayedSongs.tsx - List of recent songs with: artwork, song, artist, album, duration, played time, progress bar, resume/play button, favorite toggle, remove button
Create RecentlyPlayedAlbums.tsx - Albums derived from recently played tracks: album artwork, album name, artist, tracks played count, completion percentage bar, resume album button, open album link
Create RecentlyPlayedArtists.tsx - Artists derived from recently played: portrait, artist name, songs played count, listening time, genres, open artist link
Create HistorySearch.tsx - Instant search with 150ms debounce across song, artist, album, genre
Create HistoryFilters.tsx - Filter by: Today, This Week, This Month, Songs/Albums/Artists, Completed/Incomplete, Favorites, Genre
Create HistoryStatistics.tsx - Animated counters: Songs Played, Albums Played, Artists, Listening Sessions, Hours Listened, Average Session Duration, Favorite Genre, Most Played Artist
Create ListeningInsights.tsx - Display insights like 'You listened for X hours this week', 'Most Played Artist: Y', 'Favorite Genre: Z', 'Longest Session: N minutes'. Glass-light cards
Create HistoryRecommendations.tsx - Smart recs based on listening history: Continue Listening, Related Albums, Similar Songs, using existing recommendation patterns
Create RecentlyPlayedSkeleton.tsx - Progressive loading skeleton
Create EmptyHistory.tsx - Premium empty state: illustration, 'You haven\'t listened to anything yet', buttons (Browse Music, Trending Songs, Popular Artists)
Add a 'History' tab to app/favorites/page.tsx alongside songs/artists/albums/collections
Ensure full keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, semantic HTML, focus-visible, touch targets >= 44px
Responsive: desktop shows timeline + sidebar layout, tablet responsive timeline, mobile vertical timeline with sticky resume card and bottom sheet filters
acceptance_criteria: History tab appears in favorites page tab navigation
Hero section renders with dynamic background from last played artwork
Continue Listening section shows unfinished tracks with progress bars
Listening timeline groups entries by date period with sticky headers
Search filters history entries in real-time
Filter chips work for time periods and content types
Empty state renders when no history exists
Remove and clear history functions work correctly
bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
verification: Run `bun run lint` and confirm zero errors
Run `bun run build` and confirm successful compilation
findings: 1. React 19 react-hooks/purity rule strictly prevents Date.now() anywhere inside component render paths including useMemo callbacks - fixed by using useSyncExternalStore(subscribeNoop, getClientNow, getServerNow) pattern to obtain stable timestamp. 2. react-hooks/refs rule prevents accessing ref.current during render - must use useSyncExternalStore instead of useRef for values needed during render. 3. The useSyncExternalStore with subscribeNoop pattern works for both hydration detection (returns true on client, false on server) and for obtaining client-side timestamps safely. 4. The PersonalizationContext now exports listeningHistory, addHistoryEntry, removeHistoryEntry, clearHistory alongside existing favorites state. 5. PERSONALIZATION_STORAGE_KEYS.listeningHistory key is 'music-search-listening-history' for cross-tab sync.
